sessionsEmpty.title: No active sessions
sessionsEmpty.description: Your account is not currently signed in on any other devices.

sessionError.title: Unable to load sessions
sessionError.description: We couldn’t load your active sessions. Please try again later.

revokeOtherSessions.title: End all other sessions?
revokeOtherSessions.description: This will sign you out from all other devices where your account is active.

signOutCurrentSession.title: Sign out from this device?
signOutCurrentSession.description: You will be signed out from this device and redirected to the sign-in page.

header.title: Active Sessions
header.description: These are the devices where your account is currently signed in. If you don’t recognize a device, sign out of it immediately.

revoke.error: Failed to end session. Please try again.

revokeOtherSessions.success: All other sessions have been ended.

signOut.error: Failed to sign out. Please try again.

header.title: Session Settings
header.description: Manage your active sessions and security.
